docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RESET AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, CHRISTOPHER HEARING SET FOR DEC-13-2018 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 0.00 - SERVED OCT-19-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LEE, CHRISTOPHER

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ANDERSON, TYLER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEE, CHRISTOPHER $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,075.00, FIVE THOUSAND DOLLARS IN MONTHLY PAYMENTS OF $500.00 PER MONTH COMMENCING ON JANUARY 15, 2018 AND CONTINUING EACH MONTHLY UNTIL PAID IN FULL. PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $500.00 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON JAN-15-18 AND ON THE 15TH DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE BECOMES DUE IMMEDIATELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
